debug_info.goal:
hyp : ∃ x, ∃ (_ : 4 < x), ∃ x_1, ∃ (_ : allExpert (after x x_1)), x_1.length < 2 * x - 4
m : ℕ
m_is_minimal : ∀ n < m, ¬∃ (_ : 4 < n), ∃ x, ∃ (_ : allExpert (after n x)), x.length < 2 * n - 4
le_m : 4 < m
S : List (Call m)
S_allExp : allExpert (after m S)
S_len_lt : S.length ≤ 2 * m - 5
is_minimal_m : is_minimal m
noHo_S : noHo m S
initPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => isInitialCall m S c) S
midPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => decide (¬isInitialCall m S c = true ∧ ¬isFinalCall m S c = true)) S
finalPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => isFinalCall m S c) S
⊢ S.length = initPart.length + midPart.length + finalPart.length

failed_attempts:
rw [initPart, midPart, finalPart, ← List.length_filter, ← List.length_filter, ← List.length_filter,
        ← List.countP_eq_length, ← List.countP_eq_length, ← List.countP_eq_length,
        ← List.countP_add_countP_not (isInitialCall m S),
        ← List.countP_add_countP_not (isFinalCall m S) (λ c => ¬isInitialCall m S c)]
    simp [and_comm]
    apply List.countP_congr
    intro c hc
    have : ¬(isInitialCall m S c ∧ isFinalCall m S c) := by
      intro ⟨hi, hf⟩
      have : v S c.fst = 1 ∧ v S c.snd = 1 := sorry
      have : ¬allExpert (after m S) := sorry
      contradiction
    simp [this]

unfold initPart midPart finalPart
    rw [← List.length_filter_add_length_filter_not (isInitialCall m S) S,

    simp only [List.filter_filter]
    congr 1
    · apply List.filter_congr; intro c _hc; simp
      intro h_fin; by_contra h_init
      -- This disjointness is Lemma 1 in Baker and Shostak (1972)
      sorry
    · apply List.filter_congr; intro c _hc; simp; tauto

have h_dis : ∀ c ∈ S, isFinalCall m S c → ¬isInitialCall m S c := by sorry
    have h_filter : (S.filter (fun c => ¬isInitialCall m S c)).filter (isFinalCall m S) = S.filter (isFinalCall m S) := by
      rw [List.filter_filter]; apply List.filter_congr; intro c hc; simp; intro h; exact h_dis c hc h
    rw [initPart, midPart, finalPart, ← List.length_filter_add_length_filter_compl (isInitialCall m S) S,
      ← List.length_filter_add_length_filter_compl (isFinalCall m S) (S.filter (¬isInitialCall m S ·)), h_filter]
    simp [List.filter_filter]

simp [initPart, midPart, finalPart, ← List.length_filter_add_length_filter_not (isInitialCall m S)]
    have h_disjoint : ∀ c ∈ S, isFinalCall m S c → ¬isInitialCall m S c := sorry

    congr
    apply List.filter_congr

simp [initPart, midPart, finalPart]
    rw [List.length_filter_add_length_filter_not S (isInitialCall m S),
        List.length_filter_add_length_filter_not (S.filter (fun c => ¬isInitialCall m S c)) (isFinalCall m S)]
    simp [List.filter_filter, and_comm]

simp [initPart, midPart, finalPart]

    rw [List.length_filter_add_length_filter_neg (isFinalCall m S) (S.filter (λ c => ¬isInitialCall m S c))]

simp [initPart, midPart, finalPart, List.length_filter]
    rw [← List.countP_add]
    · rw [← List.countP_add]
      · rw [List.length_eq_countP_true]; congr; funext c

    · intro c _; simp; intros; contradiction
sorry

apply List.length_congr; intro c hc; simp; intro; tauto [h_disj c hc]
  rw [initPart, midPart, finalPart, h1, h2, ← h3]

simp [initPart, midPart, finalPart]
    rw [← List.length_filter_add_length_filter_not S (isInitialCall m S),

    simp [List.filter_filter]

    have h_disjoint : ∀ c ∈ S, isFinalCall m S c → ¬isInitialCall m S c := by

    exact List.filter_congr (λ c hc => by simp [h_disjoint c hc])

    have h_rest := List.length_filter_add_length_filter_not (isFinalCall m S) (S.filter (fun c => ¬isInitialCall m S c))

      simp [finalPart, List.filter_congr (fun c hc => by simp [h_disj c hc])]
    rw [h_init, h_rest, h_final_rest, midPart, add_assoc, add_comm finalPart.length]
